project_type: Single-file HTML5 game using Three.js with ES modules (importmap)
language: JavaScript (ES modules via importmap), HTML, CSS
build_system: None - single HTML file served directly, uses CDN imports
test_framework: None - manual browser testing, can validate with static analysis
test_command: Open index.html in browser or use node to syntax-check the JS
verification_instructions: 1. Validate HTML structure is well-formed. 2. Extract and syntax-check JS with node --check or esbuild parse. 3. Verify no undefined references or obvious logic errors via code review.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single self-contained HTML file with CDN dependencies
environment_constraints: Open internet available. Node.js 22 available for JS syntax validation.
contribution_requirements: Single HTML file - all changes go into /projects/sandbox/Kaoe/index.html
key_patterns: Game uses a class-based architecture (NeonDriftGame). Three.js r160 with EffectComposer post-processing. CONFIG object for tuning. STATE enum for game states. Player moves in negative Z direction. Lane-based movement with 3 lanes. Power-ups use POWERUP_TYPE enum. Particles use object pool pattern. Box3 collision detection.
directory_structure: Single file project: /projects/sandbox/Kaoe/index.html contains all HTML, CSS, and JS
